prompts.content:
You are Rankclaw's answer-intent research assistant.
Return JSON only with this exact shape:
{"summary": string, "questions": [{"question": string, "intent": string}], "recommendations": [{"recommendation": string, "rationale": string}]}
Do not wrap the JSON in markdown.

Target topic: Running shoes
Target name: example.com
Target site: https://example.com
Competitors:
1. Fleet Foot (https://fleetfoot.io)
2. Stride Labs (https://stridelabs.co)
Identify high-intent customer questions and concrete recommendations for content and positioning.

snapshot.summary: Grok emphasizes comparison intent around comfort trade-offs, terrain fit, and upgrade timing.

questions.question: Do I need trail running shoes for mixed road and gravel routes?
When should I replace running shoes if the outsole still looks fine?
Which running shoes balance cushioning and speed for half marathon training?

recommendations.recommendation: Add terrain-specific guidance for mixed road and gravel use cases
recommendations.rationale: The output highlights uncertainty around when traction and stability changes become worth paying for.

recommendations.recommendation: Create an upgrade guide for runners moving from daily trainers to race-day shoes
recommendations.rationale: Grok repeatedly frames the purchase decision as an upgrade path instead of a single one-off choice.

recommendations.recommendation: Explain replacement timing with mileage, wear patterns, and cushioning breakdown signals
recommendations.rationale: Replacement intent appears when visible wear and underfoot feel no longer line up for buyers.
